title: Glass Optimized
description: A modern, optimized modpack based on Simply Optimized. Adding a ton of essential utility mods. Spend more time playing than installing extra mods.
body:
# Glass Optimized: A satisfying vanilla experience. Glass Optimized is a plug and play modpack based on Simply Optimized.
It features all the optimization from SO with added useful client-side mods, like Appleskin and Ok Zoomer. ## **The features:** - Every performance mod from Simply Optimized. - Zoom mod (Ok Zoomer) - Hunger & saturation info (AppleSkin) - Cool-looking & useful HUD (StarHUD) - Shulker Box Tooltip - uku's Armor HUD - Xaero's minimap & world map - Slyde (Allows sliders to be dragged further than default) - Sodium Extra - Mod Menu & Reese's Sodium Options - Freecam (for cinematic screenshots & stuff) ## **Why I made this modpack:** Like many other people, I play a lot of Minecraft.
Often times, when I find myself on a different computer, or reinstalling my OS, I have to install a basic optimization modpack (Simply Optimized) and then I painstakingly look up & install all the QoL mods I want to use. (Appleskin, Ok Zoomer, Shulker Preview, etc.) Then I wondered: "What if I could just install everything in one go?" ...and that's how I made Glass Optimized. No, it's not unique. There's like a billion other modpacks that do the same job as this one. But from my hours of playtime on vanilla SMP's, this is the perfect combination of mods if you wanna have a great time.

No tacky menus, weird F3 screens or cash-hungry cosmetics mods. Very refreshing. ## **Wanna use it in your own project?** Sure. This would make a great base for any of your projects. Just give appropriate credit & respect Simply Optimized's license.
